description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a prominent gable roof and a fenced perimeter. The front facade includes a covered porch area, large glass doors, and windows that open onto a tiled patio. Along one side, there is a narrow swimming pool adjacent to a paved walkway and additional covered outdoor space. The rear of the bungalow is simpler, with fewer windows and a more private appearance. The structure is surrounded by a low fence, and the exterior walls are finished in light-colored materials with contrasting dark roof tiles. The overall design is modern and functional, with clear zones for outdoor relaxation and entry.
description: A modern single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, and side swimming pool, surrounded by a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, large windows, and the gated fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the swimming pool, and the extended patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and a more private, enclosed appearance.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a solid wall with a single window and the continuation of the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
